title: Frozen Themed Portfolio Home
prompt:
Title: Frozen Themed Portfolio Home
Context: Personal portfolio website for a computer science student, themed with a Frozen movie aesthetic.
Description of the screen: A modern desktop portfolio homepage inspired by the movie 'Frozen'. The design uses a cool color palette of ice blue, crisp white, and deep navy. The header features a subtle crystalline background pattern. Sections like 'Skills' and 'Projects' are housed in cards with semi-transparent frosted glass effects (glassmorphism) and soft blue glows. Typography is clean and professional but with elegant, slightly whimsical headings. Include snowflake-inspired icons for social links. The 'Experience' timeline uses a shimmering ice trail line. The 'Get In Touch' form has a soft, glowing border reminiscent of Elsa's magic. overall feel is magical yet clean and professional.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
